# NelliDESiGN — BrochureDesign.Pro

> Premium brochure design studio specialising in company profiles, product catalogues and corporate brochures. 15+ years of craft, conversion-led design, fixed quote in 24 hours. Serving India, UAE, UK, USA, Europe and Middle East.

## Contact
- Website: https://brochuredesign.pro
- Email: hello@nellidesign.com
- Phone: +91 94971 27222
- Parent company: NelliDESiGN (https://www.nellidesign.com)
- Social: @riasnelli (X/Twitter), @nellidesigner (Facebook), @nelli.designer (Instagram)

## Services

### Corporate Brochure Design
Multi-page print and digital brochures for B2B and B2C businesses. Includes layout design, typography, imagery curation, and print-ready file preparation with proper bleed, margins and CMYK colour settings.

### Company Profile Design
Professional company profiles that tell your brand story — from start-ups seeking investor attention to established firms refreshing their market presence. Covers visual identity, content structure, and production-ready files.

### Catalogue Design
Product catalogues for manufacturers, retailers and distributors. Structured layouts that showcase product ranges with clear categorisation, specifications, pricing grids and call-to-action design.

### Print Design
All forms of print collateral: flyers, leaflets, posters, banners, stationery and marketing material. Delivered in press-ready formats compatible with offset and digital printing workflows.

### Packaging Design
Product packaging and label design for consumer goods, cosmetics, food & beverage, and industrial products. Includes dieline preparation, material specification guidance and print production support.

### Corporate Presentation Design
PowerPoint and Keynote presentation design for pitches, investor decks, annual reviews and sales collateral. Focus on visual storytelling, data visualisation and brand consistency.

## Process

1. **Brief & Discovery** — Understand your audience, goals, brand assets and content.
2. **Concept & Strategy** — Present visual direction and structural approach for approval.
3. **Design & Refinement** — Two full rounds of revisions included in every project.
4. **Production & Delivery** — Print-ready files with proper technical specifications.

## Pricing

Fixed project quotes — no hourly billing surprises. Pricing depends on:
- Page count and document length
- Content quality and availability
- Turnaround time requirements
- Design complexity and custom illustration needs

Typical brochure projects range from ₹15,000 to ₹1,50,000+. Custom quotations provided within 24 hours of receiving a brief.

## Turnaround Time

- Standard brochure/company profile: 7–14 days from brief approval
- Catalogue design: 10–21 days depending on product count
- Rush projects available on request

## Geographic Reach

Fully remote workflow. Active client base in:
- India (Kerala, Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai)
- United Arab Emirates (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah)
- United Kingdom (London, Manchester)
- United States
- Europe
- Middle East

## FAQ

**How long does a brochure project take?**
Most company profiles and brochures take 7–14 days from brief approval to print-ready files. Rush projects are possible.

**Do you provide content writing?**
Design-focused, but works closely with client copy and can recommend trusted copywriters.

**What do I need to start?**
A brief covering audience, goals, page count and existing brand assets (logo, fonts, photos).

**Do you handle printing?**
Delivers press-ready files and recommends reliable print partners locally and internationally.

**How many revisions are included?**
Two full rounds included. Additional rounds can be added.

## About the Designer

Rias — founder of NelliDESiGN. 15+ years of experience in graphic design, branding and print production. Based in Kerala, India. Specialises in creating brochures, company profiles and catalogues that drive business results.

## Tools & Software

Adobe InDesign, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Acrobat, Figma, Microsoft PowerPoint, Apple Keynote.
